title: Garlicy Pasta with Homemade Tomato Sauce
description: A classic Italian dish made with fresh ingredients. This recipe yields a flavorful and easy-to-make pasta sauce.
instructions: Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil.
Add the uncooked pasta and cook until al dente, about 8-10 minutes.
While the pasta cooks, heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add the minced garlic and cook until fragrant, about 1-2 minutes.
Add the chopped tomatoes and cook for 5-7 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Season the sauce with salt and pepper to taste.
Combine the cooked pasta and tomato sauce in a serving bowl.
Top with grated mozzarella cheese, if desired.
